name: ai-video-forge
description: GitHub-deployable AI video generation control room for LTX-2, Wan 2.2, and Mochi workflows.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
